name: ProxyPin
tagline: Open source free capture HTTP(S) traffic software
description: ProxyPin is an open-source, cross-platform tool to intercept, inspect, and rewrite HTTP(S) network traffic on Windows, macOS, Linux, Android, and iOS, with features like filtering, scripting, and request/response manipulation. :contentReference[oaicite:0]{index=0}

features.title: HTTP(S) traffic capture
features.description: Intercept and capture HTTP and HTTPS network traffic across devices and platforms.

features.title: Traffic inspection
features.description: Inspect captured requests and responses with search and filtering by domain or content types.

features.title: Request/response rewriting
features.description: Modify or redirect requests and responses with custom rules or scripts.

features.title: Scripting support
features.description: Write and use JavaScript scripts to dynamically handle and transform traffic.

features.title: Domain filtering
features.description: Filter traffic by domain names to focus only on relevant network requests.

features.title: Request blocking
features.description: Block specific requests based on URL patterns to prevent them from reaching servers.

features.title: History and HAR export
features.description: Save and review historical traffic data with support for HAR format export and import.

features.title: Toolbox utilities
features.description: Includes auxiliary tools like encoding helpers, favorites, and other utilities.
